title: Kaohsiung-Tainan LOGPAC Playback
description: Scripted demo timeline for driving the full Quarterback logistics workflow in narrative order.

steps.title: Mule 2 reaches Checkpoint Slate
steps.summary: Transmit Mule 2's routine position update into LOGNET-1.

steps.title: Nomad 6 reports Route Dagger hazard
steps.summary: Transmit the hazard observation that creates a Review-Required Interpretation.

steps.title: Hammer 4 accepts the Denied Area
steps.summary: Apply the operator review action that creates the Route Dagger Denied Area.

steps.title: Nomad 6 reports JP-8 burn rate
steps.summary: Transmit the Supply Signal that updates Nomad JP-8 projection and regenerates the Executable COA.

steps.title: Hammer 4 approves the Route Dagger COA
steps.summary: Approve the generated Executable COA so Mule 2 receives an approved Draft Transmission with Outbound Audio.

steps.title: Hammer 4 asks Quarterback for the last thirty
steps.summary: Transmit the addressed intent that produces a grounded Quarterback rollup and Outbound Audio.
